text:
This is one of the hardest things we’ve ever had to write.
As many of you know, our sweet boy has been battling ongoing heart issues. Despite continued care & monitoring, his heart is still struggling, & we’ve been told there isn’t much more that can be done to improve his condition. We’re now facing the toughest decision we’ve ever had to make... choosing comfort & peace for him.
Before that day comes, we want to do something that feels true to who he is. We’re having a “living funeral” for him... a chance for all of his favorite humans & furiends to come by, play & run one last time, give him love, share stories, sneak him some pets, and say goodbye in a way that feels full of warmth instead of just grief. There will be pup cups... because if there’s one thing he believes in, it’s good food and good company.
If you’ve loved him, walked him, babysat him, fed him, or simply smiled when you saw him, we’d love for you to come celebrate his life with us. This isn’t goodbye yet. It’s gratitude. It’s honoring the joy he’s brought into our lives. It’s letting him feel just how loved he is.
Please come as you are. Bring a story. Bring a hug. Bring your love for pup cups. He deserves to be surrounded by the people who have made his life so full
Date: Thursday 03/19/26
Doral Starbucks 7230 NW 36th St Miami, FL  33166
Time: 7-8pm
